nodes.name: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation
nodes.description: name: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation | short_description: Fiber-rich ricotta toast topped with berries and a touch of honey for a balanced breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion: Toast whole-grai
nodes.premise: Meal: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation - name: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation | short_description: Fiber-rich ricotta toast topped with berries and a touch of honey for a balanced breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion: Toast whole-grain bread, spread with ricotta, drizzle with a small amount of honey, and top with fresh berries. Garden Veg Variation: add thin cucumber slices, tomato wedges, or a handful of greens under the ricotta for extra vegetables. | nutrition_note: Whole-grain bread provides fiber and sustained energy; ricotta adds protein and calcium; berries deliver vitamins and antioxidants; honey contributes natural sweetness. Suitable as a balanced breakfast or snack; for lower sugar, reduce honey portion.

nodes.name: Smoothie — Smoky Variation
nodes.description: name: Smoothie — Smoky Variation | short_description: Creamy banana peanut butter oat smoothie; a protein- and fiber-rich option with potential smoky flavor tweaks. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: en
nodes.premise: Meal: Smoothie — Smoky Variation - name: Smoothie — Smoky Variation | short_description: Creamy banana peanut butter oat smoothie; a protein- and fiber-rich option with potential smoky flavor tweaks. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: enjoy as a balanced breakfast or post-workout snack. To adjust macros, use dairy-free milk or lower-fat milk; to boost protein, add Greek yogurt or a protein powder; to introduce a smoky note, blend in a pinch of smoked paprika or a dash of cinnamon. | nutrition_note: Creamy smoothie built from banana, milk, peanut butter and oats. Rich in protein from peanut butter and milk, with fiber from banana and oats, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Calorie content varies by milk type and portion, but a typical 12–16 oz serving is about 400–480 kcal with roughly 14–22 g protein, 40–60 g carbohydrates and 12–20 g fat.

nodes.name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Garden Veg Style
nodes.description: name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Garden Veg Style | short_description: A creamy Greek yogurt bowl with berries, granola, and chia seeds offering protein, fiber, and healthy fats; easily adaptable to a garden
nodes.premise: Meal: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Garden Veg Style - name: Greek Yogurt Bowl — Garden Veg Style | short_description: A creamy Greek yogurt bowl with berries, granola, and chia seeds offering protein, fiber, and healthy fats; easily adaptable to a garden-vegetable theme with a simple veggie garnish. | meal_suggestion: To emphasize the Garden Veg Style, add a small side of chopped cucumber or tomato or top with fresh herbs. For a veggie boost, stir in a handful of spinach or arugula before serving. Opt for lower-sugar granola if desired. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich Greek yogurt provides calcium and probiotics; berries add fiber and antioxidants; chia seeds contribute omega-3 fats and extra fiber; granola adds complex carbohydrates and crunch. If watching sugar, choose a lower-sugar granola.
